title: Minsaara Poove Song Lyrics Padayappa
stanzas: <div>Minsaara Poove Song Lyrics Padayappa

Minsaara poove
pen poove
mei theendavendum
ennodu vaaraai
en aasai oasi kelaai

Maalaiyin pon marbinil
naan thuyilkolla vendum
kaalaiyil un kangalil
naan veyil kaaya vendum

sagiye sagiye sagiye
en meesaikkum aasaikkum
poojaikkum nee vendum

Minsaara kannaa
Minsaara kannaa
en mannaa
en aanai kaettu
en pinne vaaraai
en aasai oasai kelaai

koondhalil vilum pookkalai
nee madi yendha vendum
naan vidum perum moochile
nee kulir kaaya vendum

mathana mathanaa mathanaa
en poovukkum thaevaikkum
sevaikkum ne vendum
minsaara kannaa

Oru Aanukku ezhudhiya
ilakkanam unnidathil kanden
en paathathil pallikolla
unakkoru anumadhi thanthen

ennaadai thaangikolla
enkoondhal yendhikolla
unakkoru vaaippallavaa

naan unda michcha paalai
nee undu vazhndhu vanthaal
motchangal unakkallavaa

vaanam vandhu valaigirathe
vanagida vaaa...

Minsaara poove
pen poove
mei theendavendum
ennodu vaaraai
en aasai oasi kelaai

Vennilavai thatti thatti
seidhu vaitha sirppam
ondru kanden

adhan vizhiglil valivadhu
amudhalla visham endru
kanden

adhan nizhalalaiyum
thoduvadhu pazhi endru
vilagivitten

valvizhiyaal valai virithai
vanjanai vellaadhu
valaigalile meen sikkalaam
thanneer endrum sikkaadhu

vaa endraal naan
varuvathillai
po endraal naan
maraivathillai

idhu nee naan endra
poatti alla
nee aanaiyittu soodikolla
aangal yaarum
pookkal alla...

Minsaara kannaa
en mannaa
en aanai kaettu
en pinne vaaraai
en aasai oasai kelaai

Minsaara kannaa..
Minsaara kannaa..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Minsaara Poove?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, conveying a heartfelt message about devotion and desire.

What is the context of the song in the movie Padayappa?

In Padayappa, the song highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters, showcasing their emotional connection.

Who are the singers of Minsaara Poove?

The song features the melodious voices of Nithyashree and Srinivas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Minsaara Poove was composed by the renowned A.R. Rahman.

When was Minsaara Poove released?

The song was released on April 10, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Minsaara Poove, the lyrical beauty and melodic charm come together to create a captivating experience. The song reflects the deep emotional bond between the characters in Padayappa, evoking feelings of love and yearning. With its soothing composition by A.R. Rahman, it resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys and pains of romance. This timeless classic continues to be a favorite for celebrations and romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Minsaara Poove from Padayappa is a timeless romantic melody that beautifully encapsulates the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Nithyashree and Srinivas, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and A.R. Rahman's magical composition. Experience the nostalgia and emotional depth that makes this song a cherished classic in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Minsaara flower, girl flower, you must come to me, my desire is to hear you.
In the golden heart of the evening, I need to rest, in the morning, I want to see the sunlight in your eyes.
You are needed for my mustache, my desires, and my worship.
Minsaara eyes, Minsaara eyes, my king, listen to my call, my desire is to hear you.
In the curls, flowers bloom, you must come to my lap, in the big breeze, you must cool down.
For my flower and my needs, you are needed, Minsaara eyes.
I saw a sign written for a man, I found it in your presence, I gave you a blessing in my sight.
Can you bear my pain, my curls are calling you, do you have a way to come?
I am the one who creates the path, if you come, will you find happiness?
The sky has come to bless, come and bow down...
Minsaara flower, girl flower, you must come to me, my desire is to hear you.
I saw a sculpture made by the moonlight, it was beautiful.
In its eyes, I saw sweetness, not poison.
I have separated from its shadow, saying it is a mistake.
With a bright eye, the trap is set, deceit cannot be caught, in the nets, fish cannot escape water.
If you say come, I will not come, if you say go, I will not forget.
This is not a bond between you and me, you are not a flower, no one can come here...
Minsaara eyes, my king, listen to my call, my desire is to hear you.
